function.name: edit_file
function.description: Replace text in a file. 'find' must match EXACTLY ONCE — include enough surrounding context to make it unique — unless replace_all is set.

find.description: Exact text to replace; must be unique in the file unless replace_all is true.

replace.description: Replacement text (use an empty string to delete the matched text).

replace_all.description: Replace every occurrence instead of requiring a unique match (optional, default false).
